name: RestorArt: Horizon Bay Collector's Edition
short_description: Restore damaged masterpieces and uncover hidden stories in the enchanting seaside town of Horizon Bay!
detailed_description:
Restore damaged masterpieces and uncover hidden stories in the enchanting seaside town of Horizon Bay! From MixoGames, the acclaimed creators of the Twistingo and Lost Amulets series, comes a new artistic adventure that invites you to unleash your creativity once again.

After your celebrated success in Fairwood Hills, you're off to Horizon Bay, a coastal haven brimming with charm, creativity, and artistic flair! Engage in an exciting variety of gameplay, including captivating hidden object searches, creative coloring tasks, fun matching puzzles, and intricate art restoration challenges. Discover mysterious artifacts concealed in secretive boxes, and unlock fascinating stories behind each masterpiece you restore.

This is a special Collector's Edition release full of exclusive extras you won’t find in the standard version.  The Collector’s Edition includes:

  • Customizable studio!

  • Exclusive game modes, bonus levels and puzzles!

  • Replay your favorite tracks on the music player!
